justifications.clarity: Prose is consistently lucid and well-paced across all sections. Definitions are precise and cross-referenced correctly. Transitions between sections are smooth, with motivating paragraphs that explain why each topic follows the last. Financial examples are concrete and well-integrated.
justifications.rigor: All key mathematical results are accompanied by proofs or derivations: vanishing-gradient bound, sqrt(d_k) scaling result, and positional encoding rotation property are each proven in full. BPTT formula correctly sums over all future loss terms. Nucleus sampling correctly states proportional (not uniform) sampling. LSTM constant-error carousel qualified with Bengio 1994 citation. Constitutional AI explicitly described as training-time. KD loss includes Remark on forward vs. reverse KL with cross-entropy equivalence. FinBERT example clearly distinguishes Araci (2019) and Huang (2023) as two distinct models. GRU attributed to Cho et al. (2014) with Chung et al. (2014) for empirical evaluation.
justifications.completeness: Covers all seven learning objectives: RNN vanishing-gradient derivation, scaled dot-product attention proof, sampling strategies, constrained decoding with Python, full RAG pipeline with code, knowledge distillation/LoRA/quantisation, and hallucination mitigation techniques. Modern LLM landscape, financial benchmarks, and regulatory limitations also covered.
justifications.pedagogy: Learning objectives explicitly listed at chapter opening and map directly to content sections. Difficulty progresses from static embeddings through RNN mathematics to Transformer derivations and distillation. Context boxes frame practitioner motivation; deep-dive boxes deliver mathematical depth. Python listings cover three ecosystems with the same task for direct comparison.
justifications.style: Writing is natural and authoritative. Notation is consistent throughout. Zero instances of \textbf{} used as inline paragraph-level labels inside \itemize or \enumerate environments — all 18 violations have been corrected. LaTeX environments used consistently. Context/deepdive wrapper structure applied correctly.
